indicators.name: seating arrangement
indicators.rationale: The seating arrangement is open and flexible, allowing for individual workspaces.

indicators.name: large screen
indicators.rationale: The large screen can display information or video content, which might be useful for work.

indicators.name: ambient lighting
indicators.rationale: The ambient lighting is soft and evenly distributed, reducing glare and eye strain.

indicators.name: open space
indicators.rationale: The open space allows for privacy and reduces distractions, which is beneficial for focused work.

reasoning_summary: The space is moderately suitable for computer work (solo) due to its open layout, flexible seating, and good lighting, but lacks dedicated workstations.
